description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a seamless knit upper in a dark gray color, providing a sleek and minimalistic appearance. The shoe has a low-cut ankle collar and a streamlined silhouette, with a reinforced heel and toe area for added durability. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat, dark laces, and the eyelets are integrated into the knit material for a clean look. The midsole and outsole are constructed from a solid, slightly textured black material, likely rubber or EVA, designed for traction and comfort. The tread pattern on the sole is lugged, suitable for urban environments and light outdoor use. There are no visible logos or branding elements, giving the shoe a versatile and understated aesthetic.
description: A sleek, dark gray knit athletic shoe with a low-cut design, criss-cross laces, and a lugged black sole. The shoe is minimalistic, durable, and suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the knit upper, reinforced heel, and the lugged black sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the criss-cross lacing and rounded toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the knit texture and integrated eyelets.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the heel structure and the back of the sole.
